name: mysql-tool-read-only-gate
description: MySQLQueryTool rejects INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/ALTER/TRUNCATE/CREATE via a leading-keyword regex and returns {'error': 'refused: ...'} instead of executing; EXPLAIN/SHOW/DESCRIBE pass. Connection fields resolve per-flow override -> MYSQL_* env var -> APP_DB_CONN fallback. Results are capped at fetchmany(200).
invariants: Row contents may hold customer/PII data — logs carry query text, row count, and timing ONLY, never row values
Write rejection happens before any connection is opened
contracts: Returns JSON {query, row_count, rows} on success or {query, error} / {error} on failure — never raises to the agent loop
